case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. LUIS FELIPE HAU MAY

docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 11/28/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAY, LUIS FELIPE HAU $1,144.72 PRINCIPAL, $146.83 INTEREST, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,376.55, PRINCIPAL PLUS LATE FEE PLUS PREJUDGMENT INTEREST FROM 6/21/2018 PLUS COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,301.36 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MAY, LUIS FELIPE HAU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00) SERVED OCT-22-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MAY, LUIS FELIPE HAU
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: INCOMPLETE PROOF OF SERVICE THAT WAS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF ON 10-16-18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-28-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-28-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT LUIS FELIPE HAU MAY DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2018 - JUDGMENT.
